pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 19-114: JSON data embedded and written to this exact path
export_result.sh line 11: This file path is checked in export process; proposal_number 'SES-2415837' from setup_task.sh line 37
setup_task.sh line 98: NSF requirement specifies '1 inch (2.54 cm) on all sides'; 1 inch × 2.54 = 2.54 cm (standard conversion)
Task metadata design choice; no authoritative source specifies this tolerance value

setup_task.sh lines 102-110: required_sections list contains 7 sections (Introduction and Intellectual Merit, Theoretical Framework and Literature Review, Research Design and Methods, Data Sources and Sampling Strategy, Timeline and Project Management, Broader Impacts, References Cited). Minimum of 6 is reasonable.
Data structure suggests multiple subsections (survey, interviews, gis_analysis under methods; multiple budget categories), but exact minimum is task design choice
setup_task.sh lines 111 and task.json description: 'Budget Justification section with a table summarizing budget categories' requires minimum 1 table
setup_task.sh line 22: PI name 'Dr. Elena Vasquez-Reyes' contains 'Vasquez'
setup_task.sh line 45: Study site 'Permian Basin' contains 'Permian'
setup_task.sh line 42: Project keywords include 'environmental justice'; also in project title line 35 and throughout project description
setup_task.sh line 79: total_direct_costs = 349875 (raw number); formatted with comma as 349,875 in professional documents
setup_task.sh lines 38 and 79: requested_amount and total_direct_costs both equal 349875 (raw format without comma)
setup_task.sh line 71: PI salary total = 85500 (raw); formatted with comma as 85,500 in professional documents

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic grant proposal data for Dr. Elena Vasquez-Reyes studying environmental justice in extraction zones across the Permian Basin, San Juan Basin, and Powder River Basin. The proposal is embedded in setup_task.sh with total budget of $349,875, including PI salary of $85,500. The proposal number SES-2415837 follows NSF's standard format (program prefix + digits) and is allocated to the NSF Sociology Program (SES). Required margins are 1 inch (2.54 cm) on all sides per NSF standards. The document requires minimum 6 Heading 1 sections and 1 table for budget justification.
